title:
A OpenAi dona do chatgpt cochilou e foi surpreendida com o novo modelo de IA da Google, o Veo 3.1. Essa cena foi criada usando a AivanaLabs, que além de integrar o Veo 3.1, Sora 2 e Hailuo 2.3, oferece ferramentas avançadas para criação cinematográfica com IA de forma simples, rápida e visual.

Com a Aivana Labs, você cria cenas como essa em minutos, com sons realistas, texturas precisas, movimentos de câmera cinematográficos e total controle criativo.

🎬 Quer testar? Acesse agora: o link da nos

prompt_text: A futuristic, ultra-modern stadium skyscraper towering over a sprawling city at dusk. The structure is shaped like a giant, vertical glass ring or loop, with a full-sized football pitch suspended in the middle of the loop. The architecture features sleek glass facades, glowing blue neon accents, and a golden domed roof. The surrounding city, likely Dubai, is filled with glowing orange streetlights and densely packed skyscrapers. The lighting is cinematic, with bright stadium floodlights intermittently flashing and a warm twilight glow over the horizon.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A futuristic, ultra-modern stadium skyscraper towering over a sprawling city at dusk. The structure is shaped like a giant, vertical glass ring or loop, with a full-sized football pitch suspended in the middle of the loop. The architecture features sleek glass facades, glowing blue neon accents, and a golden domed roof. The surrounding city, likely Dubai, is filled with glowing orange streetlights and densely packed skyscrapers. The lighting is cinematic, with bright stadium floodlights intermittently flashing and a warm twilight glow over the horizon.

cinematography.mood: Futuristic, grand, awe-inspiring, and technologically advanced.
cinematography.cameraShot: Aerial wide shot, slightly low-angle looking up at the structure. The camera is static with subtle digital zooms and light flare effects.

actions: The massive circular stadium structure stands stationary above the city grid.
Bright white floodlights around the stadium ring flash on and off rapidly, creating a lens flare effect.
Small aircraft or drones can be seen moving slowly in the distant background sky.
The camera zooms in slightly toward the center of the stadium pitch.
dialogue: Male narrator in Portuguese: 'É meus amigos, aqui em Dubai o futebol é diferente. Olha essa estrutura que é sensacional.'
English translation: 'Yes my friends, here in Dubai football is different. Look at this structure, it is sensational.'
Ambient city hum and light electronic background music.
